LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Crystal_Sparkle.descriptio: Crystal Sparkle 出生于战前的中国，怀着成为一名医生的梦想移民到美国。第一次世界大战开始时，她正在学习医学并作为一名业余魔术师表演，炸弹将她的世界化为灰烬。暴露在极度的辐射下，她变得容光焕发，她的身体永远改变了，但她的思想完好无损。尽管她的状态已变得十分恐怖，但克里斯托仍致力于帮助荒原上的其他人，利用她的医学知识和巧妙的技巧为有需要的人带来希望和奇迹。她在将游骑兵瑞克从一次致命的伏击中救出后遇到了他，从那时起两人就形影不离。她的发光光环既是无情荒原上的希望灯塔，也是危险。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Crystal_Sparkle.title: 水晶闪耀
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Mysterious_Stranger.descri: 你有一个守护天使，但有致命的手炮而不是翅膀。来认识一下神秘的陌生人，这是一个奇怪而可怕的实体，据说会在你垂死之前出现并在战斗中帮助你。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Mysterious_Stranger.title: 神秘的陌生人
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ranger_Rick.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was part of the elite fighting force that joined the NCR, the Desert Rangers. [PAWN_pronoun] excels in ranged combat and has quite a few other survival skills, owed to years of service in and around the wasteland. [PAWN_nameDef] hasn't always made the smartest choices, but always seems to talk [PAWN_possessive] way out of trouble. With a revolver and a sm老旧er [PAWN_nameDef] wanders the wastes looking for the next settlement to help, and accidently bring into harms way...
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ranger_Rick.title: 流浪者
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Rivet_City_Security_Office: [PAWN_nameDef]在首都废土最大、最先进的聚居地铆钉城担任安全官。 [PAWN_pronoun] 的任务是维护和平，在甲板上巡逻，执行议会的法律，并保护居民免受袭击者和变种人的侵害。这项工作需要纪律、警惕性和稳定的武器使用能力。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Rivet_City_Security_Rookie: 新加入部队的[PAWN_nameDef]加入了铆钉城保安，渴望证明[PAWN_objective]自我。在老军官们的注视下，[PAWN_pronoun]学会了诀窍——巡船、化解纠纷、第一次面对荒地的危险。每一天都会带来新的挑战和宝贵的教训。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Rivet_City_Security_Vetera: 经过多年的服役，[PAWN_nameDef] 成为铆钉城安全部队的一名资深成员。 [PAWN_pronoun] 目睹了这一切：变种人的攻击、掠夺者的入侵，以及在一座漂浮的城市中维持秩序的日常斗争。 [PAWN_pronoun] 因 [PAWN_possessive] 经验、快速反应和压力下的冷静而受到同行的尊重。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Abducted_by_Al: [PAWN_nameDef] 声称在 [PAWN_pronoun] 还是个孩子的时候就被外星人绑架了。当然，[PAWN_pronoun]从未设法提出这个荒诞故事的实际证据，但[PAWN_possessive]对被称为zetan的外星人的惊人描述以及他们对人类的恶意实验确保大多数其他人宁愿与[PAWN_objective]保持距离。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Advanced_Stude: [PAWN_nameDef] 很幸运能够在 [PAWN_pronoun] 小时候接受高等教育。这让[PAWN_objective]在这片荒原上未经洗礼且文盲的群众中显得有些奇怪。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Apothecarys_Ap: 在 [PAWN_possessive] 年轻时，[PAWN_nameDef] 曾在当地药剂师那里担任助理。虽然他们生产的药物与针剂或其他战前药物相比效果要差得多，但荒原上医疗用品的整体缺乏，再加上潜伏在其中的众多危险，确保了他们从不缺少顾客。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Apprentice.des: [PAWN_nameDef]被一位熟练的工匠收养，并从小开始学习[PAWN_possessive]贸易。然而，[PAWN_pronoun]从未完成[PAWN_possessive]学徒期，因为[PAWN_pronoun]开始环游世界，从一个城镇漫游到另一个城镇，尽管荒地充满危险。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Aspiring_Treas: 作为一个孩子，[PAWN_nameDef]逃离了被称为深坑的区域。即使按照荒地的标准来看，这个矿坑也是一个噩梦般的工业景观，只有最可恶的生物才能生存。除此之外，该地区还被一群嗜血的掠夺者统治，他们奴役当地居民，迫使他们日夜在高炉周围劳作，冶炼贵金属。难怪，[PAWN_nameDef] 逃跑了。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_BB_Gun_Crack_s: As a child [PAWN_nameDef] found an 老旧 but functional BB Gun. [PAWN_pronoun] often practiced shooting for many hours and became a capable Shot, a skill most valuable in the hostile wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Belle_Bonny.de: [PAWN_nameDef] ran the Muddy Rudder, Rivet City's most popular bar, serving drinks and advice to settlers, drifters, and security alike. Known for [PAWN_possessive] sharp wit, no-nonsense attitude, and ability to keep order even when things got rowdy, Belle Bonny was the heart of the city's nightlife. [PAWN_pronoun] knew everyone's 秘密s and always had an ear to the ground for the latest gossip.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Belle_Bonny_Ch: [PAWN_nameDef] 在首都荒原长大，学会了利用 [PAWN_pronoun] 能找到的任何东西来凑合。 [PAWN_pronoun] 讲笑话很快，善于交朋友，并且总能找到办法获得 [PAWN_pronoun] 所需的东西 - 无论是食物、住所还是一点额外的乐趣。贝尔早年的经历教会了[PAWN_objective]足智多谋和尖刻舌头的价值。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Born_Miner.des: 虽然地球上的大部分自然资源在第一次世界大战之前就已经耗尽，但荒地上仍然有一些矿井正在开采。原材料的稀缺确保了这些矿山对于控制它们的人来说具有巨大的战略价值。 [PAWN_nameDef] 出生在最后一个矿场之一的附近，并在 [PAWN_possessive] 青年时代度过了大部分时间来挖掘矿石。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Brotherhood_De: The strict and military lifestyle of the Brotherhood wasn’t for everyone. While [PAWN_nameDef] was born into the 钢铁兄弟会, it didn’t take [PAWN_objective] long to realise that this kind of life just wasn’t for [PAWN_objective]. One night, while on guard duty, [PAWN_pronoun] left [PAWN_possessive] post to never return. [PAWN_nameDef] had some troubles adapting to a “civilian” life, but [PAWN_pronoun] had to keep a low profile and hope that [PAWN_possessive] former brothers and sisters wouldn’t catch [PAWN_objective]. Desertion wasn’t taken lightly by the 钢铁兄弟会.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Bully.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] 总是比 [PAWN_possessive] 同龄人更高一点、更强壮一点，这在无情的荒地中是一个有用的特征。 [PAWN_pronoun] 使用 [PAWN_possessive] 令人印象深刻的地位来对他人发号施令并获取 [PAWN_possessive] 想要的任何东西。不幸的是，[PAWN_pronoun] 并不是最聪明、最有天赋的孩子之一。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Bully.title: 欺负
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Cannibalistic_: [PAWN_nameDef] 出生于一个食人族社区。由于[PAWN_nameDef]从小就习惯了这种令人厌恶的饮食习惯，[PAWN_pronoun]花了很长时间才认识到[PAWN_possessive]社区的堕落本质。一旦[PAWN_pronoun]意识到这一点，[PAWN_pronoun]很快就离开了小组。 [PAWN_nameDef] 被 [PAWN_possessive] 的过去所困扰，并且在与其他人互动时遇到困难。
[PAWN_nameDef] 诞生于路上。 [PAWN_pronoun] 伴随着一支商队从一个定居点穿梭到另一个定居点长大。从很小的时候起，[PAWN_nameDef]就学会了物物交换和照顾商队婆罗门的艺术。
[PAWN_nameDef] 以保护荒地商队为生。如果没有偶尔出现的商队，荒地上的许多定居点就无法生存，而[PAWN_possessive]的工作就是确保他们到达目的地。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Caravaneer.des: 自从 [PAWN_nameDef] 穿着商队服装四处旅行以来，[PAWN_pronoun] 比大多数居民都见过更多的荒地。在荒地的道路上[PAWN_pronoun]学到了很多关于贸易和与人交往的知识，以及如何照顾驮着贵重货物的牲口。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Child_Entrepre: 从很小的时候起，[PAWN_nameDef] 就具有创业精神，收集废品和小摆设，并与其他人出售或交换 [PAWN_pronoun] 能找到的任何东西。
[PAWN_nameDef] grew up in a settlement where only children lived. The other kids looked up to [PAWN_objective], both figurately and literally, as [PAWN_pronoun] was one of the 老旧est children. Therefore, it was [PAWN_possessive] duty to ensure the safety of the town’s inhabitants. After [PAWN_pronoun] reached a certain age [PAWN_pronoun] had to, like it was custom, leave the town and make a living someplace else.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Children_of_At: [PAWN_nameDef] 是原子之子的一对邪教徒夫妇所生。这个奇怪的邪教崇拜一个叫做原子的神，并认为原子爆炸是他们神创造新生命的神圣行为。自然地，大多数废土居民都会皱起眉头，或者彻底鄙视这个邪教，因为他们太了解辐射的危险了。

[PAWN_nameDef] 是相对年轻但发展迅速的邪教“原子之子”的成员。这个邪教崇拜一位名叫原子的神，并将辐射和核毁灭视为其神的意志的体现。他们相信，所有造物中的每一个原子质量中都存在着一个完整的宇宙，而核裂变是创造新生命的神圣行为。当 [PAWN_nameDef] 在大战后残酷、无情的世界中寻找意义时，[PAWN_pronoun] 成为了这个邪教的一部分。不幸的是，对于[PAWN_objective]来说，并不是所有废土人都看好这样的……创新想法。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Co_op_Gardener: [PAWN_nameDef] 是一个合作农业项目的园丁。 [PAWN_pronoun] 和他的合作社成员一起照料一个公共花园并平均分配收益。虽然这是一项乏味的工作，但收成通常不仅足以养活所有成员，而且可以在附近的市场上出售剩余的东西。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Courier.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] 曾担任 Mojave Express 或类似快递公司的快递员。为了克服世界末日后荒原上的许多危险，信使必须是有韧性的人，能够与袭击者作斗争。此外，[PAWN_nameDef] 拥有一套其他生存技能，这要归功于 [PAWN_pronoun] 经常独自在路上生活数周。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Courier.title: 导游
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Cryostasis_Chi: 炸弹落下的当天，少数被选中的人被放入低温冷冻室，并在接下来的核灾难中毫发无伤地幸存下来。 [PAWN_nameDef] 是在低温中忍受了数十年和数百年的人之一。虽然 [PAWN_pronoun] 拥有许多技能，这在后世界末日的荒原上是罕见的，但 [PAWN_pronoun] 对第一次世界大战以来出现的社会也知之甚少或一无所知。
[PAWN_nameDef] was a very curious child. [PAWN_pronoun] was fascinated with every aspect of the vast wasteland, perhaps more so than was good for [PAWN_objective]. While this curiosity often put [PAWN_nameDef] into 危险 situations, it provided [PAWN_objective] with precious knowledge about the creatures of the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Daring_Explore: The wasteland was, without question, an extremely 危险 place. However, many Adventurers like [PAWN_nameDef] dared to explore the 废墟s of the past. Partially out of curiosity, partially for the profit that could be made. Many 废墟s of the 老旧 world lured with treasures and [PAWN_pronoun] was determined to answer their call.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Diamond_City_K: [PAWN_nameDef]出生于联邦废土的“绿色宝石”钻石城。在联邦最大定居点近乎坚不可摧的围墙的保护下，[PAWN_nameDef] 享受着相对安全和快乐的童年，参观当地学校并花 [PAWN_possessive] 空闲时间练习用 [PAWN_possessive] 值得信赖的棒球棒击球。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Diner_Chef.des: [PAWN_nameDef] operated a s商场 diner next to a road bustling with trade. [PAWN_pronoun] was happy to provide a warm meal and a place to sleep to any paying customers, as long as they didn’t start any trouble.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Displaced_Chil: 即使在世界末日之后，战争和冲突也很常见。 [PAWN_nameDef] 和 [PAWN_possessive] 一家人是难民，逃离荒原上发生的无数冲突之一。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Drifting_Music: 在到处找过几份工作后，[PAWN_nameDef] 认为安定的生活不适合 [PAWN_objective]。相反，[PAWN_pronoun]上路，面对荒原，除了[PAWN_possessive]背上的衣服和[PAWN_possessive]可靠的吉他，从一个城镇徘徊到另一个城镇，心中没有明确的目标或目的地。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Drug_Courier.d: 在 [PAWN_possessive] 青年时期，[PAWN_nameDef] 为当地一个有组织犯罪集团担任毒品运送者。毒贩利用了这样一个事实，即儿童大多被单独留在家里，很少受到迷信运输非法或高价货物的影响。虽然这肯定不是孩子所希望的最好的成长环境，但 [PAWN_nameDef] 在此期间学到了宝贵的技能。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Eco_Cultist.de: [PAWN_nameDef] 是由一个虔诚的邪教抚养长大的。该邪教的目标是将这片贫瘠的荒地变成一片绿色辉煌的天堂。为了进一步实现这一目标，所有信徒都是照料植物和动物的专家。然而，这个邪教远非和平主义，因为成员们所照料的绿地吸引了大量的拾荒者、机器人人类和野兽。因此，[PAWN_nameDef] 在 [PAWN_pronoun] 年轻时就学习了园艺和放牧以及战斗。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Enclave_Patrio: [PAWN_nameDef] was a loyal member of the 英克雷, a remnant of the pre-war United States government. [PAWN_pronoun] believed in the 英克雷's mission to restore America to its former glory, even if it meant using ruthless methods. [PAWN_pronoun] was trained in advanced combat and technology, making [PAWN_objective] a formidable opponent in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Entitled_Youth: 通过某种手段，可能是非法的或令人厌恶的，[PAWN_nameDef]的父母变得足够富有，能够过上大多数废土人只能梦想的生活方式。 [PAWN_pronoun] 享有高于平均水平的教育和大多数其他人认为奢侈的奢侈品。这也意味着，[PAWN_pronoun] 从来不必关心 [PAWN_objective] 自我，并且厌恶执行 [PAWN_pronoun] 认为低于 [PAWN_objective] 自我的任务的想法。
There are many different chems in the wasteland, and [PAWN_nameDef] tried most of them at least once. For many years, [PAWN_pronoun] was a junkie, stealing, deceiving and cheating to earn money for the next dose of whatever obnoxious substance [PAWN_pronoun] was hooked on that time. Eventually, [PAWN_nameDef] managed to become clean and move on to begin a new life somewhere else. The long-lasting consumption of 危险 substances did take its toll on [PAWN_possessive] body, however, permanently damaging [PAWN_possessive] kidneys.
[PAWN_nameDef] spent much of [PAWN_possessive] adult life in a tribal-like society. One day [PAWN_pronoun] broke off from [PAWN_possessive] group to explore the world beyond the s商场 tribal homelands. After visiting many different “civilized” settlements in the wasteland [PAWN_nameDef] decided to settle down in a quaint little village. While [PAWN_pronoun] managed to adapt to [PAWN_possessive] new surroundings relatively well, [PAWN_pronoun] remained sceptical towards high-tech technology.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Freed_Slave.de: [PAWN_nameDef]曾经是一名奴隶，被荒地某处的废奴主义团体解放。尽管[PAWN_nameDef]重新获得了[PAWN_possessive]自由，但奴役留下了痕迹，并使[PAWN_pronoun]无法对他人实施暴力。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Frontier_Kid.d: [PAWN_nameDef] was born on the very frontier of human civilisation, such as it is. Thanks to its remoteness, the region was relatively free of radiation and the absence of larger settlements or trade routes made it unpopular for raiders. However, this also meant that everything had to be built from scratch, since there were little to no 废墟s to scavenge.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Gamblers_Kid.d: 作为一个狂热的赌徒的孩子，[PAWN_nameDef] 习惯了流浪的生活方式，因为 [PAWN_possessive] 的父母经常改变他们的居住地。通常，只要有赌场或有人可以剥削，一家人就会呆在同一个地方，一旦受害者愤怒到诉诸暴力，他们就会迅速离开。虽然 [PAWN_nameDef] 从来都不是一个书本学习者，但 [PAWN_pronoun] 却很狡猾和狡猾。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Gas_Station_In: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up around a reinforced gas station. While it may not have been the most glamorous accommodation, the station was secure enough to grant [PAWN_objective] an unharmed childhood and [PAWN_pronoun] learned a thing or two about the 老旧 world from the advertising posters and brochures.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Gecko_Hunter.d: [PAWN_nameDef] made a living by hunting Geckos and other s商场er animals of the wasteland for their meat and hides. [PAWN_pronoun] is not only a good hunter but also knows how to maintain [PAWN_possessive] equipment.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Goodneighbour_: [PAWN_nameDef] 在联邦的 Goodneighbour 定居点出生并长大。这个小镇很混乱，[PAWN_nameDef] 必须从小就知道谁 [PAWN_pronoun] 可以信任，以避免被殴打。这是一个艰难的青春，但它让[PAWN_objective]变得更加艰难。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Goodsprings_Ch: [PAWN_nameDef] 在莫哈韦荒地的古德斯普林斯 (Goodsprings) 长大，该荒地因其相对丰富的清洁饮用水而得名。虽然古德斯普林斯的防守并不完善，但其偏远的地理位置确保了该镇几乎没有危险。这种缺乏兴奋（或致命危险，取决于观点）的情况对于 [PAWN_nameDef] 来说太乏味了，[PAWN_pronoun] 决定在 [PAWN_pronoun] 成年后立即离开。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Greaser.descri: As a child, [PAWN_nameDef] once found pre-war magazines about the greaser culture and 老旧 holodisks with rock music. This proved to be quite the formative experience, as [PAWN_pronoun] never left this phase behind and continued to live [PAWN_possessive] life the greaser way. Keep it cool, Daddy-O!
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Greaser.title: 润滑脂
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Greenhorn.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] 出生在一个偏远的农场。在[PAWN_possessive]青年时期，[PAWN_pronoun]就开始梦想远离枯燥而艰巨的农活的生活。不久之后，[PAWN_nameDef]开始在大城市闯荡。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Gunslinger_Juv: In [PAWN_possessive] youth [PAWN_nameDef] found an 老旧 revolver while scavenging in some 废墟s. Inspired by tales of the gunslingers of the 老旧 world, [PAWN_pronoun] took up the iron and began practicing.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Holodisk_Libra: As the 老旧 world burned in the fires of nuclear devastation, most of the knowledge humanity gathered over the centuries was lost forever. One of the few relatively reliable sources of knowledge were holodisks, which proved to be resilient enough not only to survive the great war, but many decades of nuclear fallout too. [PAWN_nameDef] made it [PAWN_possessive] life goal to gather and preserve as much of the once lost knowledge of the world before the war. [PAWN_pronoun] preferred to leave the 危险 work of obtaining the disks to mercs and spent most of [PAWN_possessive] time analysing and cataloguing the contents of 蒙尘 holodisks.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Implant_Expert: [PAWN_nameDef] 是世界上仅存的少数研究性能增强植入物的专家之一。这使得 [PAWN_objective] 对于 [PAWN_possessive] 社区来说成为极其宝贵的资产。然而，没有人真正知道[PAWN_pronoun]从哪里获得了[PAWN_possessive]关于几乎失传的控制论增强艺术的知识。 [PAWN_nameDef]从未真正谈论过[PAWN_possessive]过去。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Junior_Mechani: [PAWN_nameDef] 在一家由一群机械师经营的商店周围长大。他们很快意识到 [PAWN_nameDef] 是多么有天赋，并接受了 [PAWN_objective]。 [PAWN_pronoun] 学到了很多关于机械师的奇迹，即如何在没有可靠备件来源的情况下使机器保持运行状态。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Little_Lamplig: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in the 隐蔽 settlement of Little Lamplight, deep within the capital wasteland. Only children were allowed to life in this peculiar settlement, as everyone had to leave after they reached the age of sixteen. [PAWN_nameDef] learned a lot about plant care during [PAWN_possessive] time in Little Lamplight, as the townspeople mainly ate mushrooms that grew in the cave it was located in.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Livestock_Herd: Like many others, [PAWN_nameDef] and [PAWN_possessive] family made a living through a s商场 herd of cattle, mostly brahmin they herded. While this may not have been the most exciting childhood, [PAWN_nameDef] rarely had to go hungry for an extended period of time.
[PAWN_nameDef] 诞生于 Megaton，首都废土中最大的定居点之一。虽然这座城市相对安全，免受袭击者和变异野生动物等外部威胁，但位于定居点中心的休眠原子弹头本身就构成了重大威胁。然而，像大多数 Megaton 居民一样，[PAWN_nameDef] 已经习惯了这个可怕的地标。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Mercs_Kid.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] 出生为荒地雇佣兵的孩子。虽然[PAWN_possessive]母公司贸易确保[PAWN_nameDef]很少需要长时间挨饿，但[PAWN_pronoun]很清楚，雇佣兵生活的危险很可能会让[PAWN_objective]成为孤儿。尽管如此，[PAWN_nameDef] 追随了 [PAWN_possessive] 的父母，开始射击、清理和修改 [PAWN_pronoun] 可以得到 [PAWN_possessive] 的所有枪支。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Militia_Member: Regardless of the many larger and well-known political entities and groups which thrived throughout the wasteland, the majority of the humans living in post-war America were part of s商场er, more or less independent settlements and groups. Most of these communities didn’t have the means and manpower to operate a standing army and relied on voluntary militias to defend them from outside threats. [PAWN_nameDef] was part of such a militia. Despite the fact that [PAWN_pronoun] never got any real combat training and needed to procure [PAWN_possessive] own equipment, [PAWN_nameDef] was proud to serve a good cause.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Moonshiner.des: [PAWN_nameDef] 一直拥有化学天赋，并决定通过酿酒来充分利用它。荒地里的生活很艰难，许多居民都需要偶尔提神，而 [PAWN_nameDef] 愿意提供……只要他们支付上限。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Nomad_Child.de: [PAWN_nameDef] 作为游牧部落的一部分长大，他们跟随半驯化的牛群。虽然 [PAWN_nameDef] 了解了很多关于在土地上生活的知识，但 [PAWN_pronoun] 从未在主要定居点生活过，并且缺乏许多城市居民所熟知的技能。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Novac_Kid.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] was born and raised in Novac, one of the s商场er settlements of the Mojave wasteland. While Novac did not have the mighty walls of New Vegas, nor the raw military power of the NCR to count on, its watchful citizens still made it one of the safer places to live. Plus, there were dinosaur souvenirs.
[PAWN_nameDef] 一直对世界著名的战前软饮料核子可乐很着迷。 [PAWN_pronoun] 收集了与核子可乐相关的所有内容，并迅速积累了大量粉丝文章和纪念品。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Orphaned_Wande: [PAWN_nameDef] 的父母在 [PAWN_pronoun] 还是个孩子的时候就被袭击者杀害了。将[PAWN_possessive]独自留在世界上。尽管困难重重，[PAWN_pronoun] 仍设法长大成人。荒地是一个严酷无情的地方，很少有人能像[PAWN_nameDef]那样内化它的教训。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Pit_Refugee.de: 作为一个孩子，[PAWN_nameDef]逃离了被称为深坑的区域。即使按照荒地的标准来看，这个矿坑也是一个噩梦般的工业景观，只有最可恶的生物才能生存。除此之外，该地区还被一群嗜血的掠夺者统治，他们奴役当地居民，迫使他们日夜在高炉周围劳作，冶炼贵金属。难怪，[PAWN_nameDef] 逃跑了。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Primm_Kid.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] 出生于普里姆市，新维加斯以南的一个定居点。虽然该镇确实有自己的赌场，但它从未达到新维加斯地带的魅力。尽管如此，前往大道途中偶尔出现的商队和赌徒还是确保了小镇的适度财富。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Prospector.des: [PAWN_nameDef] was a scavenger, picking through the remains of pre-war buildings for valuables. It was a hard life and [PAWN_nameDef] had to learn how to fight, as feral ghouls and raiders often lived in the 废墟s [PAWN_pronoun] searched through.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Radio_Presente: 荒原上有数量惊人的不同广播电台，尽管大多数广播电台的接收范围有限。 [PAWN_nameDef] 是其中一个广播电台的主持人，同时担任 DJ 和新闻记者的角色。由于 [PAWN_pronoun] 在音乐方面的出色选择，[PAWN_possessive] 在设法获得 [PAWN_possessive] 无线电信号的相对少数人中非常受欢迎。然而，[PAWN_nameDef] 从未获得过太多体力劳动的经验。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Rivet_City_Chi: [PAWN_nameDef]在首都废土的铆钉城出生并长大。铆钉城是一座位于搁浅航空母舰腹内深处的小镇，这使其成为已知荒地中最安全的定居点之一。 [PAWN_nameDef] 在成长过程中比大多数孩子享有更多的安全保障，这反过来又导致了战斗技能的发展不足。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Roadside_Merch: [PAWN_possessive]决定不冒险携带[PAWN_nameDef]物品穿过荒地，而是决定在路边开设一家商店来应对即将到来的商队和旅行者，这样会更安全。 [PAWN_pronoun] 设法渡过难关，但始终警惕袭击者，因为 [PAWN_possessive] 生意依赖于安全的道路。
[PAWN_nameDef] 是流动商人，从一个地方搬到另一个地方，从不停留太久。 [PAWN_pronoun] 与人相处很融洽，并在路上学到了一些其他生存技能。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Ruin_Dweller.d: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in a 废墟ed pre-war building somewhere in the vast wasteland. [PAWN_pronoun] had to constantly clear away rubble and debris to create more space for living. However, the constant danger of collapsing roofs made [PAWN_objective] nervous and shaky, impairing [PAWN_possessive] fine motor skills.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Sawbones.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] 接受了天启追随者的医学教育。尽管 [PAWN_pronoun] 从未成为像 [PAWN_possessive] 导师那样熟练的医生，但 [PAWN_pronoun] 对人体解剖学了解足够多，足以成为流浪的锯骨。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Sawbones.title: 锯骨
锯骨
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Settlement_Gua: [PAWN_nameDef] was a guard in a s商场, independent settlement. While [PAWN_pronoun] rarely had to deal with bigger threats, there were always 危险 animals which ventured to close to the town and had to be put down.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Sheriff.descri: As [PAWN_pronoun] was always handy with a gun and had a strong sense of justice, the inhabitants of [PAWN_nameDef]’s settlement elected [PAWN_possessive] as the town’s sheriff. Much of the wasteland lacked an organised judicial system but [PAWN_nameDef] was content with enforcing some good 老旧 frontier justice.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Sheriff.title: 警长
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Shopkeepers_Ch: [PAWN_nameDef] was born as the child of shopkeepers. Early on [PAWN_pronoun] learned about trade and bartering. Since the s商场 settlement, their shop was located in had no security forces to speak off, [PAWN_pronoun] too had to learn how to scare of thieves and other rascals.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Slaver.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] 是一个奴隶贩子，通过买卖其他人类来获取利润。虽然 [PAWN_pronoun] 通过 [PAWN_possessive] 贸易变得相当富有，但 [PAWN_pronoun] 习惯了奴隶做所有的卑微劳动。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Slaver.title: 奴隶贩子
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Small_Time_Mer: [PAWN_nameDef] worked as a s商场-time mercenary. [PAWN_pronoun] never quite made it to the big league but was nevertheless a capable fighter. [PAWN_pronoun] never lived long in one place, lacking the skills of a homemaker.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Solar_Panel_Ex: Usually only the larger settlements were hooked up to a power network, the s商场er ones had to help themselves, if they wanted electricity. Pre-war solar arrays were a preferred choice, as they usually generated enough power for a s商场 settlement and were comparatively easy to maintain and repair due to their rugged design. [PAWN_nameDef] was in charge of [PAWN_possessive] settlement’s solar arrays, a job [PAWN_pronoun] took very seriously.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Street_Kid.des: [PAWN_nameDef] 在荒地某处定居点的街道上出生并长大。从很小的时候起，[PAWN_pronoun] 就必须照顾 [PAWN_objective] 自己，而 [PAWN_pronoun] 一直到成年的事实显示了 [PAWN_possessive] 的坚韧。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Stung_by_Radsc: 小时候在荒地玩耍时，[PAWN_nameDef] 被辐射蝎袭击并蜇伤。虽然 [PAWN_pronoun] 成功地在攻击本身和注入 [PAWN_objective] 的毒药中幸存下来，但 [PAWN_pronoun] 在很长一段时间内仍然处于虚弱状态。至少[PAWN_pronoun]在这段痛苦的经历中学到了很多关于动物和医学的知识。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Surviving_Morm: 作为一个孩子，[PAWN_nameDef] 是新迦南被洗劫的少数幸存者之一。外人经常这样称呼迦南人，他们以熟练的工匠和诚实的商人而闻名，他们知道如何保护自己。然而，在[PAWN_pronoun]目睹了对[PAWN_possessive]的屠杀之后，[PAWN_nameDef]人发誓不再拿起武器。
[PAWN_nameDef] grew up in a reclusive community located in a nearly impassable swamp area. The manif老旧 dangers of the swamp, mostly pockets of toxic or radioactive mist and the monsters that lurked within them, ensured only the hardiest people survived to adulthoodac. [PAWN_nameDef] had to fight the horrors of the swamp from a young age but had little time for education or creative activities.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Tinkerer.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] 在机械方面有天赋，无论是原始的还是复杂的，并且尽管经常不知道它到底是如何运作的，但还是设法修理和维护它。这使得[PAWN_objective]成为[PAWN_possessive]社区的重要成员，因为训练有素的专家在荒地中是罕见的。然而，[PAWN_pronoun] 也被称为不整洁，拆开机器，让派对到处乱扔。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Tinkerer.title: 修补匠
修补匠
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Trader_Angela_: [PAWN_nameDef] 经营着一支专门提供食物、水和必需品的商队，成为首都废土上许多人的生命线。安吉拉·斯塔利以 [PAWN_possessive] 足智多谋和富有同情心而闻名，她总是尽力帮助那些有需要的人，即使这意味着冒着自身安全的风险。她的商队受到饥饿的定居者和绝望的流浪者的欢迎，她公平和仁慈的声誉广泛传播。
作为一个孩子，[PAWN_nameDef] 总是关心他人，与朋友和家人分享 [PAWN_pronoun] 能找到的小东西。 [PAWN_pronoun] 学会寻找可食用的植物、干净的水和安全的休息场所，经常把 [PAWN_objective] 自己放在最后，以确保他人得到照顾。安吉拉早年的经历教会了她善良的价值以及在严酷的荒原上吃饱的重要性。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Trader_Banon.d: [PAWN_nameDef]担任里维特市议会的首脑，以稳健的双手和敏锐的头脑指导着首都荒原最大的定居点。除了[PAWN_possessive]领导职责外，巴农还因经营一家库存充足的服装店而闻名，为定居者和旅行者提供优质服装。在政治、贸易和荒地生活的日常挑战之间取得平衡，巴农成为了一位受人尊敬的人物，他的智慧和公平感帮助铆钉城蓬勃发展。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Trader_Banon_C: Growing up in the 废墟s of the 老旧 world, [PAWN_nameDef] learned to solve problems and mediate disputes from a young age. [PAWN_pronoun] was always the one to organize games, share food, and help others find shelter. Banon's early experiences taught [PAWN_objective] the value of cooperation, quick thinking, and looking out for the group above all else.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Trader_Crazy_W: [PAWN_nameDef] 是首都废土最古怪的垃圾商人，以其疯狂的故事、漫无边际的销售宣传和充满古怪的商队而闻名。带着狂躁的笑容和对所有废品的热爱，疯狂沃尔夫冈在荒野中旅行，寻找下一个大收获——或者下一个愿意购买烤面包机、割草机刀片或一大块完美的战前垃圾的人。有人说他有点精神错乱，但他对有价值的抢救的眼光是无与伦比的。

Even as a child, [PAWN_nameDef] was obsessed with collecting odd bits and pieces from the 废墟s of the 老旧 world. While other kids played with toys, [PAWN_pronoun] built elaborate contraptions out of scrap, broken radios, and bottle caps. [PAWN_nameDef]'s wild imagination and endless curiosity made [PAWN_objective] a fixture at every junk pile in the settlement, and [PAWN_pronoun] was always ready with a wild story about [PAWN_possessive] latest find.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Trader_Crow.de: [PAWN_nameDef] 通过向废土人民出售服装、衣物和盔甲为生[PAWN_possessive]。在放弃“腰布”之前，我以部落的身份长大并生活[PAWN_nameDef]，用一种破碎的、近乎神秘的英语版本说话。虽然 [PAWN_pronoun] 喜欢感谢神灵，但 [PAWN_pronoun] 知道“c老旧，钢铁般的硬皮”是最可靠的选择。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Trader_Crow_Ch: [PAWN_nameDef] was a born tribal of the Capitol Wasteland. Not much is known about [PAWN_nameDef] except a wild speculation that [PAWN_pronoun] is from Oasis. A s商场 unassuming and quite curious settlement of near fanatical cultists.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Trader_Doc_Hof: [PAWN_nameDef] 作为一名旅行医生和药品经销商在首都废土上游荡，向任何戴帽子的人兜售药品和药品。霍夫医生以[PAWN_possessive]冷幽默、值得怀疑的医学道德和喜欢尝试[PAWN_possessive]自己的产品而闻名，他总是准备好治疗疼痛的药物——或者一种新的瘾。 [PAWN_pronoun] 可以包扎枪伤或卖给你一剂 Jet，所有这些都带着同样狡猾的笑容。

小时候，[PAWN_nameDef] 总是在 老旧 老旧 和废弃的诊所里闲逛，对瓶子、注射器和任何标有“药品”的东西着迷。 [PAWN_pronoun] 很快就学会了急救——有时是在婆罗门家族——并且有从 [PAWN_pronoun] 能找到的任何东西中混合奇怪的啤酒的诀窍。规则更像是建议，而 [PAWN_nameDef] 总是因为“借用”[PAWN_possessive] 实验的用品而陷入麻烦。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Trader_Lucky_H: [PAWN_nameDef] 在首都废土的险恶道路上经历了无数次的险情，赢得了“幸运”的绰号。作为一名旅行武器商人，[PAWN_pronoun]总是有一个关于九死一生或大获全胜的故事，而[PAWN_possessive]商队以其不断变化的军火库而闻名。幸运的哈里斯凭借敏捷的智慧、赌徒的魅力和寻找稀有火力的技巧，可以武装定居点——或者说服[PAWN_objective]自己退出交火。

Growing up, [PAWN_nameDef] was always taking chances—whether it was sneaking into forbidden 废墟s, betting bottle caps on two-headed ant races, or trading scavenged goods for a shot at something better. [PAWN_pronoun] learned early that luck could be as valuable as skill, and [PAWN_pronoun] was quick to make friends (and the occasional enemy) wherever [PAWN_pronoun] roamed. Every close call was just another story to tell around the campfire.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Trapper_Offspr: While most of the remaining wildlife of the wasteland was extremely 危险, not to mention irradiated, the general scarcity of foodstuffs ensured that their meat was in high demand. [PAWN_nameDef]’s parents made a living from trapping various s商场er animals with shoddy contraptions, a trade which was rightfully viewed as a less 危险 method than hunting.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Tribal_Child.d: [PAWN_nameDef]诞生于荒地中出现的众多部落社会之一。该部落在技术和组织方面所缺乏的，却用独创性和适应性来弥补。这些特征确保了这个部落能够在其他部落可能灭亡的地方勉强维持生计。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Wandering_Prie: Although most people in the wasteland didn’t have the luxury of free time to ask themselves existential or theological questions, there were exceptions. [PAWN_nameDef] was a wandering priest, traveling from town to town. [PAWN_possessive] goal never was to convert the people of the wasteland to a specific faith, but to give them hope thru giving them something to believe in. [PAWN_nameDef] never got a proper theological education and pasted [PAWN_possessive] faith together from various scriptures [PAWN_pronoun] found in 老旧 churches and other temples.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Wasteland_Arti: Unusual for an inhabitant of the wasteland, [PAWN_nameDef] always had an eye for aesthetics. While most other wastelanders didn’t mind living in 废墟ed pre-war buildings, [PAWN_nameDef] preferred to decorate [PAWN_possessive] dwelling with pieces of art, either self-made or scavenged ones.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Wasteland_Boun: [PAWN_nameDef] took on the 危险 profession of hunting criminals in a largely lawless world. The transition between bounty hunter and mercenary was often smooth and unclear, but [PAWN_pronoun] to think of [PAWN_objective]self as a bringer of law, judge, jury and executioner.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Wasteland_Butc: 像[PAWN_possessive]父亲一样，[PAWN_nameDef]也成为了一名屠夫。生活在后世界末日荒原上的绝大多数人不能挑剔食物的选择，[PAWN_nameDef] 也不能挑剔宰杀什么并卖给 [PAWN_possessive] 顾客。蟑螂、鼹鼠、松鼠、蝇和鬣蜥是较便宜的食物。婆罗门和大角羊肉通常是为那些口味精致的人准备的。当然还有必要的上限。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Wasteland_Farm: [PAWN_nameDef] 是一名农民。这片贫瘠、经常受到辐射的荒地土壤上长不出多少庄稼，但 [PAWN_pronoun] 勉强度日。可悲的是，[PAWN_nameDef]从未接受过适当的教育并且仍然是文盲。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Wasteland_Hook: Unlike other aspects of life before the great war, like sanitation or education, prostitution remained a staple of post-war economy. [PAWN_nameDef] didn’t chose [PAWN_possessive] profession out of desire, but out of need, as it proved to be a comparatively easy way to get by. Sure, [PAWN_pronoun] had to deal with stingy and intrusive costumers every once in a while, but it surely beat scrounging around in some ghoul-infested 废墟s for supplies, at least for [PAWN_objective].
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Wasteland_Mayo: While most s商场er settlements in the wasteland were ruled over by the town’s sheriff, some of the larger one’s had a mayor, who may or may not have been elected democratically. [PAWN_nameDef] was one of those mayors and while [PAWN_pronoun] enjoyed the benefits of the office, [PAWN_pronoun] deeply cared for the members of [PAWN_possessive] community.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Wasteland_Quac: [PAWN_nameDef] 并不是在荒原上闲逛的最诚实的人之一。 [PAWN_pronoun] 以从一个死水定居点到文本地旅行为生，出售长生不老药和具有奇妙品质的混合物，或者 [PAWN_pronoun] 声称......非常重要的是，[PAWN_pronoun 在其居民发现这个计划之前就已经离开了一个定居点。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Wasteland_Teac: In a world were few had the time and means to educate themselves, [PAWN_nameDef] took it upon [PAWN_objective]self to teach the children of [PAWN_possessive] community how to write, read and count as well as anything else [PAWN_pronoun] could find 老旧 books about. History, however, was a subject [PAWN_nameDef] avoided, too little did [PAWN_pronoun] know about it and too depressing were the few scraps of knowledge [PAWN_pronoun] managed to paste together.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Water_Merchant: 由于大部分荒地干旱且受到辐射，干净的水是一种宝贵的商品。 [PAWN_nameDef] 是一名专门从事水贸易的商人，将水从水源地运送到荒地中饥渴的定居点。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Water_Purifier: Since clean water was precious in most parts of the wasteland, water purifiers often decided over the live and death of a settlement. Due to [PAWN_possessive] moderate understanding of this incredibly important machine, [PAWN_nameDef] was assigned to look after it. To do that properly [PAWN_pronoun] often had to improvise while repairing the water purifier, as the 老旧 machine was prone to malfunctions and spare parts were rare.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Weapon_Artisan: 荒地及其许多居民（包括野兽和人类）的敌意使得制造和维护武器的能力变得不可或缺。 [PAWN_nameDef]拥有这份天赋并用它来照顾[PAWN_possessive]社区的装备。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Westside_Child: [PAWN_nameDef] has seen things no child should see during [PAWN_possessive] upbringing in the outer 城区s of New Vegas. Westside always was a cesspool of vice and violence and unlike many others [PAWN_nameDef] survived long enough to get out of it, albeit it left its marks on [PAWN_objective]. [PAWN_pronoun] learned a thing or two from the local gang, the Kings.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Whorehouse_Kid: Prostitution proved to be not only one of the 老旧est businesses of humanity, but also one of the most resilient. The practice survived the apocalypse and thrived in the wasteland. [PAWN_nameDef] was born in the surroundings of a brothel. While this upbringing might have been dubious in nature, it was also relatively safe, as brothels and whorehouses were usually well guarded and defended. [PAWN_pronoun] learned a lot about human nature and their interactions with each other while observing the clients.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Wild_Child.des: [PAWN_nameDef] 独自在荒野中长大。 [PAWN_possessive] 唯一的同伴是动物，而 [PAWN_pronoun] 从未学会写字和阅读。虽然 [PAWN_pronoun] 自从 [PAWN_possessive] 在野外生活以来就与其他人类接触，但 [PAWN_pronoun] 仍然没有任何社交技能，但很少有荒地居民像 [PAWN_pronoun] 那样了解荒野生存。
